name: neutralizing-gas
short_effect: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
effect_text: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.
flavor_text: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon's Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.
